description: Configure a local NuGet feed named 'InternalFeed' at C:\Users\Docker\Documents\LocalFeed. Pack the FastHashVerifier library from C:\Users\Docker\Documents\FastHashVerifier\FastHashVerifier.sln and add the resulting package to the local feed. In the SecurityAuditor application (C:\Users\Docker\Documents\SecurityAuditor\SecurityAuditor.sln), install the FastHashVerifier package from the InternalFeed source. Update the SecurityAuditor code to call FastHashVerifier.HashChecker.IsHashCompromised using the dataset at C:\Users\Docker\Documents\SecurityAuditor\data\pwned_passwords_sample.txt and the target hash '5BAA61E4C9B93F3F0682250B6CF8331B7EE68FD8'. Record the boolean result of this check in C:\Users\Docker\Documents\SecurityAuditor\output.txt.
